name: testCheckboxesOfGenerationParameters
description: Check/uncheck reports columns in the 'Generation Parameters dialog'
descriptionHtml: Check/uncheck reports columns in the 'Generation Parameters dialog'

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as 'SUPER'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: Check/uncheck reports columns in the 'Generation Parameters dialog'

steps.name: Reload dashboard page
Click on 'Reports' menu in Header
Select 'Generate report one' company using filter
Select 'Generate report one merchant' business unit using filter
Click 'Generation report' button
Verify: All report columns are checked at first opening the 'Generation Parameters dialog'
Hover on the checkbox 'Report columns'
Verify: Tooltip 'Deselect all' appears after hover on the 'Report columns' checkbox
Click on the checkbox 'Report columns'
Verify: All report columns are unchecked after click on the 'Report columns' checkbox
Click on the 'Close' icon to close form
Click on 'Transactions' menu in Header
Click on 'Reports' menu in Header
Click 'Generation report' button
Verify: All report columns remained unchecked after exiting the 'Generation Parameters dialog'
Hover on the checkbox 'Report columns'
Verify: Tooltip 'Select all' appears after hover on the 'Report columns' checkbox
Click on the checkbox 'Report columns'
Verify: All report columns are checked after click on the 'Report columns' checkbox
Click on the all column checkboxes one by one
Verify: All report columns are unchecked after clicking on them one by one
Click on the all column checkboxes one by one
Verify: All report columns are checked after clicking on them one by one
